summary: Tested 8 build/provider assertions: 7 passed and 1 failed. VAL-LOCAL-016 failed because the first exact `cargo test --features local` run on a fresh isolated HOME exited 101 from a local-model download race in `test_dimension_mismatch_and_inference`, although a warm-cache rerun and `cargo clippy --features local -- -D warnings` both succeeded.

assertions.title: Default build excludes local dependencies
assertions.reason: The isolated default release build completed successfully, the default cargo tree contained no `ort` or `tokenizers`, and both default binaries lacked ONNX/local marker strings.

observations: `VAL-LOCAL-001-default-build.log` ends with `Finished `release` profile [optimized] target(s) in 1m 15s`.
`VAL-LOCAL-001-default-tree.txt` had no matches for `ort` or `tokenizers`.
`build-core-binary-summary.json` shows the shared and rebuilt default binaries are both 62,721,728 bytes and contain none of the ONNX/local marker strings.

assertions.title: Local build compiles successfully
assertions.reason: The isolated `--features local` release build completed successfully and the resulting local binaries exposed ONNX/local marker strings plus `ort`/`tokenizers` in the cargo tree.

observations: `VAL-LOCAL-002-local-build.log` ends with `Finished `release` profile [optimized] target(s) in 1m 15s`.
`VAL-LOCAL-002-local-tree.txt` includes `ort v2.0.0-rc.12` and `tokenizers v0.22.2`.
`build-core-binary-summary.json` shows both local binaries contain `onnxruntime`, both Jina model identifiers, and `tokenizer.json` marker strings.

assertions.title: Local embedding produces valid 768-dim vectors
assertions.reason: The shipped local embedding provider test passed in an isolated HOME; that test exercises `LocalEmbeddingProvider::embed_batch` and asserts a 768-dimensional, finite, non-zero embedding result for known strings.

observations: Exit code 0.
`val-local-003-embedding-test.stdout` reports `running 1 test` and `... ok`.
`val-local-provider-tests-summary.json` shows the isolated HOME downloaded the embedding model, ONNX data, and tokenizer files under `~/.vera/models/...`.

assertions.title: Local reranker produces valid ordered scores
assertions.reason: The shipped local reranker test passed in an isolated HOME; that test uses a relevant and an irrelevant document and verifies descending ordered relevance scores.

observations: Exit code 0.
`val-local-004-reranker-test.stdout` reports `running 1 test` and `... ok`.
`val-local-provider-tests-summary.json` shows the isolated HOME downloaded the reranker ONNX model and tokenizer.

assertions.title: Model auto-download on first use
assertions.reason: On a fresh isolated HOME, the first local index/search downloaded embedding and reranker assets with progress lines to stderr, created the expected `~/.vera/models/` files, and identical second runs skipped all download output.

commands: env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/build-core/home-download-retry /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local --json index --local /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/build-core/sample-repo

cd /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/build-core/sample-repo && env -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_BASE_URL -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_ID -u EMBEDDING_MODEL_API_KEY -u RERANKER_MODEL_BASE_URL -u RERANKER_MODEL_ID -u RERANKER_MODEL_API_KEY HOME=/tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/build-core/home-download-retry /tmp/vera-usertest-local-inference/bin/vera-local --json search --local parse_config
Repeat both commands with the same HOME to confirm warm-cache behavior
observations: `val-local-005-summary.json` shows first index/search downloaded with progress and both second runs had no `Downloading` lines.
All four local CLI runs exited 0.
`val-local-005-model-files.json` lists both Jina model directories plus embedding/reranker tokenizer files in `~/.vera/models/`.
The first and second search outputs both returned `src/main.rs::parse_config` as the top result.

assertions.title: Default binary size unchanged
assertions.reason: The default binary remained lean and free of local inference markers: the rebuilt default binary matched the shared default byte-for-byte, while the local binary was ~47.54% larger and included ONNX/tokenizer markers.

observations: `build-core-binary-summary.json` records default size 62,721,728 bytes vs local size 92,540,736 bytes (+47.5418%).
The shared and rebuilt default binaries are the same size, and both lack ONNX/local marker strings.
`VAL-LOCAL-001-default-tree.txt` contains no `ort`/`tokenizers` entries, while the local tree does.

assertions.title: Local tokenization via HuggingFace tokenizers
assertions.reason: Combined shipped-surface evidence shows the local path uses HuggingFace tokenizers: the local-feature tree includes `tokenizers`, fresh-home provider tests downloaded `tokenizer.json` for both models and passed on known strings, and local CLI runs succeeded with API credentials explicitly unset.

commands: Local CLI index/search commands from VAL-LOCAL-005 with all EMBEDDING_* and RERANKER_* variables unset
observations: `VAL-LOCAL-002-local-tree.txt` includes `tokenizers v0.22.2`.
`val-local-003-embedding-test.stderr` and `val-local-004-reranker-test.stderr` each show fresh-home downloads of `tokenizer.json`.
`val-local-005-summary.json` shows the local CLI path worked with all API credential variables removed, so tokenization/embedding/reranking stayed on the local model path.

assertions.title: cargo test --features local passes
assertions.reason: The first exact `cargo test --features local` run on a fresh isolated HOME exited 101 because `retrieval::search_service::tests::test_dimension_mismatch_and_inference` failed during local model initialization (`Failed to download ONNX data: No such file or directory`). A warm-cache rerun then passed and `cargo clippy --features local -- -D warnings` passed, so the validator surface is flaky rather than reliably green from a clean local-model cache.

commands: Retry the same command with the now-warm HOME cache
observations: Initial `cargo test --features local` exit code was 101.

The failing test was `retrieval::search_service::tests::test_dimension_mismatch_and_inference`, and stderr ended with `Failed to initialize local embedding provider: embedding API error (status 500): Failed to download ONNX data: No such file or directory (os error 2)`.
The exact rerun exited 0 once the same HOME had cached local model files.
`cargo clippy --features local -- -D warnings` exited 0.

frictions.description: On a fresh isolated HOME, the first exact `cargo test --features local` run failed once during concurrent local-model initialization/download, then passed on an immediate rerun after the model cache was populated.
frictions.resolution: Retried the same command with the warmed cache to confirm the failure is first-run/cold-cache specific.
